stemHtml: A pilot working for a CAT operator has performed 105 duty hours in the last 13 consecutive days. On the 14th day, the operator's crewing department calls, asking the pilot to operate a flight with a total duty of 8 hours later that same day. According to the EU-OPS regulations, what is the correct decision?

options.a: NOT operating the flight, since duty shall NOT exceed 105 duty hours in any 14 consecutive days.
options.b: NOT operate the flight, since duty shall NOT exceed 110 duty hours in any 14 consecutive days.
options.c: Operate the flight, since the limit for duty is 115 duty hours in any 14 consecutive days.
options.d: Operate the flight, since the limit for duty is 120 duty hours in any 14 consecutive days.
